prompt: Create a vertical dark fantasy anime poster portrait of PONYO, shown in an extreme close-up from a slightly low, intimate angle. The subject is a pale young warrior with messy black hair falling over intense amber eyes, a serious brooding expression, and warm orange highlights across the face. They wear an elaborate organic bird-skull and raven-feather armor/helmet made of layered metallic golden-brown feathers, sharp beak-like plates, talons, and carved bone textures; include one prominent glowing red gemstone eye embedded in the upper helmet near the forehead. The composition should be tightly cropped so the ornate feathered helmet fills the top and right side, the face is partially shadowed in the center, and additional bird skull and feather forms frame the lower left. Use dramatic chiaroscuro lighting with molten gold reflections, tiny ember-like glows, glossy highlights, and a nearly black background. Render in highly detailed painterly anime concept-art style, cinematic, sharp facial focus, intricate textures, warm black-and-gold palette with red accents, moody and mysterious. Add the title text PONYO centered near the bottom in large glowing angular gothic serif letters, pale gold with a subtle orange aura, no other text or watermark. Use a tall smartphone wallpaper aspect ratio, about 9:16.
